notes: 26名球员 chinese_name、club_name_cn、球员级 source_log 已补齐。
首轮使用5-3-2；Sithole和Zwane纪律状态已按最新公开来源标记。

staff.career_summary: 曾执教布鲁日、安德莱赫特、亨克、喀麦隆等队，率喀麦隆获得2017非洲杯冠军，2021年执教南非。
staff.coaching_style_fact_notes: 公开履历和首轮用人显示，布罗斯倾向纪律化防守、五后卫/三中卫保护、快速反击和定位球争夺；此处只作事实记录。

facts: 首轮南非用五后卫保护禁区宽度，Mudau和Modiba负责两翼卫通道。
中场由Mokoena、Sithole、Adams构成，但Sithole红牌后结构被迫重组。
Foster和Rayners首发双前锋，主要依赖反击、二点球和快速向前。
Zwane替补后吃到红牌，后续可用性被三场停赛报道显著影响。
第二轮对捷克Mokoena点球扳平但随后出现对韩国停赛信号，需临场复核。

players.rating_missing_note: External same-match same-source player rating unavailable or not reliably extractable at policy normalization time; keep external_rating null and do not substitute subjective judgment.

internal_rating_proxy.basis: Internal model proxy derived from verified minutes, goals, assists, cards, availability, role, and form_status_1_5 notes; not an external player rating.

details: Added data.players alias from data.players_full_roster for unified roster readers; original players_full_roster retained.

rating_policy_note: external_rating is nullable and only populated when a reliable same-match same-source rating is available; otherwise rating_source_status/rating_missing_note explain the gap and internal_rating_proxy may mirror form_status_1_5 as a non-external model helper.
internal_match_rating_policy_note: internal_match_rating_1_5 is an internal model score, 1.0-5.0 with one decimal, derived from verified match events and form_status_1_5; it is not an external rating.
